inputs.prompt: Title: Midnight Sun. Format: Feature documentary, 82 min. Subject: A remote Icelandic fishing village where the last commercial fishing family faces bankruptcy as warming waters push fish stocks north. Country: Iceland/Denmark co-production. Completion: October 2026. No sales agent.
Title: Paper Trail. Format: Short documentary, 22 min. Subject: Investigative story about document forgery. Country: UK. Completion: May 2026.

Title: The Bridge Builders. Format: Feature documentary, 95 min. Subject: Three generations of a Roma family in Hungary fighting for the right to remain in a neighbourhood scheduled for demolition. Country: Hungary/Germany co-production. Completion: January 2027. Language: Hungarian with German and English subtitles. Existing interest: Berlinale has encouraged a submission.
